findings: Worker smoke path verifies launcher-to-result plumbing only, using stub agent that renames queued task; no real agent behavior, policy, branching, or claim logic tested
Metaswarm dry-run check is presentation-only, greps banner text but confirms no commander execution, SwarmMesh launch, bounded spawning, Depth Guard, or failure handling

Metaswarm structured contract validates static artifact shape with --agent-cmd true; checks prewritten metadata but not runtime enforcement of premium-only, banned-model rejection, spawn ceilings, or partial-on-downgrade

Critical SwarmMesh readiness gaps: no actual commander spawning/telemetry verification, no runtime Depth Guard check, no banned-model rejection test, no bounded-spawn assertion, no unhappy-path partial/failure coverage
